entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the target crop for molecular marker expansion

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat loci used for polymorphism detection and genetic analysis

entities.name: SSR-ENRICHED GENOMIC LIBRARY
entities.description: A genomic library used to isolate microsatellite or simple sequence repeat loci

entities.name: PRIMER PAIRS
entities.description: Short DNA sequences designed to amplify specific SSR loci

entities.name: CAJANUS SPECIES
entities.description: The group of species including cultivated and wild pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The presence of genetic variation within the population

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Alternative forms of the SSR markers

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the informativeness of genetic markers

entities.name: PHENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to distinguish genotypes based on overall similarity

entities.name: GENOME MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the location of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of associating genetic markers with specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: DIVERSITY STUDIES
entities.description: The analysis of genetic variation within and between populations

entities.name: GENE FLOW
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material between different populations
